ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO COMPEL POST JUDGMENT DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS

DISCOVERY 302: PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. DBA GREAT'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY; AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT HAS APPARENTLY FAILED TO RESPOND TO PLAINTIFF'S POST-JUDGMENT INTERROGATORIES AND FAILED TO OPPOSE THE PENDING MOTION. GOOD CAUSE HAS BEEN SHOWN FOR THE GRANT OF THE REQUESTED ORDER. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK LEHOCKY; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED. (D302)

DISCOVERY 302: PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'S MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF A RECEIVER AND TO APPOINT A RECEIVER IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 7, 2017 AT 9:00 AM IN DISCOVERY DEPARTMENT 302 TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARK LEHOCKY. AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING IS HEREBY ORDERED WHEREBY DEFENDANT MUST DEMONSTRATE WHY THE SUBJECT LIQUOR LICENSE NO. 475102 SHOULD NOT BE SUBJECT TO THE APPOINTMENT OF A RECEIVER. THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SHALL BE SCHEDULED FOR SEPTEMBER 7, 2017. THE COURT ALSO NOTES THAT THE NOMINAL OWNER OF THE SUBJECT LIQUOR LICENSE - AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBIT A TO PLAINTIFF'S MOVING PAPERS - APPEARS TO BE AN ENTITY NAMED STUGATS PARTNERS LLC, RATHER THAN THE INDIVIDUALLY NAMED DEFENDANT IN THIS MATTER, ALTHOUGH THE SAME EXHIBIT A LISTS THE INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT HERE AS A MANAGING MEMBER OF STUGATS PARTNERS LLC. PLAINTIFF AS WELL AS DEFENDANT ARE REQUESTED TO ADDRESS VIA FACTUAL DECLARATIONS AND SUPPORTING LEGAL AUTHORITY WHETHER THE REQUESTED RELIEF CAN BE APPLIED TO THE STUGATS PARTNERS LLC ENTITY UNDER THE CIRCUMSTANCES OF THIS CASE. THE MOVING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM AND SHALL GIVE NOTICE. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK LEHOCKY; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED. (D302)
ORDER AND STIPULATION FOR MOTION TO BE HEARD BY A MEMBER OF THE CALIFORNIA BAR SERVING AS TEMPORARY JUDGE

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC., DBA GREAT'S MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF A RECEIVER AND TO APPOINT A RECEIVER IS GRANTED. GOOD CAUSE APPEARS TO EXIST FOR THE REQUESTED RELIEF, AND DEFENDANT HAS FILED NO OPPOSITION TO PLAINTIFF'S MOTION. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK LEHOCKY; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint A Receiver
Off Calendar Sep-07-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Thomas A.E. Hesketh of the law offices of Thomas A.E. Hesketh (415-756-0335) makes a special appearance as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC., DBA GREAT'S Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint A Receiver is GRANTED. Good cause appears to exist for the requested relief, and defendant has filed no opposition to plaintiff's motion. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Mark LeHocky; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-24-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

Moving party having submitted on the tentative ruling and submitting a proposed written order, the Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. DBA GREAT's Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED. Defendant has apparently failed to respond to plaintiff's post-judgment interrogatories and failed to oppose the pending motion. Good cause has been shown for the grant of the requested Order. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Mark LeHocky; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint A Receiver
Off Calendar Aug-24-2017 Continued To Sep-07-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'S Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint A Receiver is CONTINUED to September 7, 2017 at 9:00 AM in Department 302/Discovery to be heard by Judge Pro Tem Mark LeHocky. An Order To Show Cause hearing is hereby ordered whereby defendant must demonstrate why the subject liquor license No. 475102 should not be subject to the appointment of a receiver. The Order To Show Cause hearing shall be scheduled for September 7, 2017. The Court also notes that the nominal owner of the subject liquor license - as reflected on Exhibit A to plaintiff's moving papers - appears to be an entity named Stugats Partners LLC, rather than the individually named defendant in this matter, although the same Exhibit A lists the individual defendant here as a managing member of Stugats Partners LLC. Plaintiff as well as defendant are requested to address via factual declarations and supporting legal authority whether the requested relief can be applied to the Stugats Partners LLC entity under the circumstances of this case. The moving party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and shall give notice.

Judge Pro Tem: Mark LeHocky; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint A Receiver
Off Calendar Aug-10-2017 Continued To Aug-24-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Terri L. Brewer, of Law Office of Terri L. Brewer, Tel. 925.262.6996, for plaintiffs;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The Court vacates the tentative ruling and the signed written order due to calendar error. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint A Receiver is continued to August 24, 2017, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 302 - Discovery. Plaintiff's counsel shall deliver courtesy copies of the Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint A Receiver to Dept. 302. Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
